---
title: "Explorer"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

Search for a city to see what it works on — which artifact types are present, how its
activity sits in the shared semantic space, and a list of individual papers, patents,
and iGEM projects from that location.

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.27.0.min.js"></script>
<div id="city-explorer"></div>
<script src="assets/js/explorer.js"></script>
```

## Geographic Overview

City-level map of total synthetic biology activity.
Bubble size scales with the number of artifacts; hover for a breakdown by type.

```{=html}
<div id="geo-explorer" style="width:100%; height:520px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:4px; margin-top:1em;"></div>
<script src="assets/js/geo.js"></script>
```
